name_en: Top-tier Original M25209. This Dauphine Soft medium handbag, designed by Creative Director Nicolas Ghesquiore, debuted in a new relaxed silhouette for the 2024 Spring/Summer show. The bag features a soft calfskin body, including a distinctive lock, detachable chain strap, and stylish leather shoulder strap. Dimensions: 24 × 17 × 9 cm
